/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/acoustic_sim_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libacoustic_sim_plugin.so -o libacoustic_sim_plugin.so CMakeFiles/acoustic_sim_plugin.dir/acoustic_sim_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/acoustic_sim_plugin.dir/acoustic_sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/acoustic_sim_plugin.dir/acoustic_sim_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
